raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Legislation will be introduced to close loopholes exploited by merchant and oil company ocean vessels regarding pipeline infrastructure notifications.",
    "A vessel in state waters dragged its anchor into a pipeline, causing damage that was not reported to authorities.",
    "The current system allows vessels to operate without notifying authorities when they strike a pipeline.",
    "Approximately 25,000 gallons of oil was released into the waters of Orange County due to a vessel damaging a pipeline.",
    "Operators of the vessel involved in the oil spill did not notify state or federal agencies about the potential damage to the pipeline.",
    "Had notifications been legally required, the oil spill could have been avoided.",
    "The upcoming legislation mandates that vessels striking or suspecting they struck a pipeline must notify several state and federal agencies.",
    "Failure to notify authorities about a pipeline strike will result in a civil penalty of up to $50,000."
  ]
}
```
